rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real, verifiable naming inconsistency within the same PR: `Deck.smul_eq_apply` and `TauCeti.Homeomorph.smul_def` serve identical purposes but carry different names, with the former departing from the Mathlib-standard `smul_def` convention. Review 1 misses this; acting on Review 2 produces an internally consistent PR aligned with Mathlib naming.
